ModMetaData.name: Super weapons and armors
ModMetaData.author: keventao
ModMetaData.description:
This mod adds LWOP items with Combat Extended support.
Items in this mod are from LWOP Package (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2012717312).
Current features: - Joywire: Permanent mood boost implant - HyperVitality Chip: Neural implant that reduces sleep need to 2 hours per day - Super Rifle: High-capacity assault rifle (CE compatible) - Super Barrett Ammo: Overpowered anti-materiel ammunition for the Super Rifle - Flying Tigers Elite Helmet: Elite head protection (200 Sharp/Blunt, 3 Electric armor, 10 Heat armor) - Flying Tigers Elite Armor: Elite combat armor (200 Sharp/Blunt, 33 Electric armor, 10 Heat armor)
Bug fixes: - Fixed ammo not loading into weapon - Added ammo description and type - Fixed bullet textures
This mod requires Combat Extended to function.
